description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a dark green body and a black cap, designed for dispensing lotion. The front of the bottle features a colorful label with a red and green floral or botanical pattern, and some white text, though the details are partially obscured. The bottle has a smooth, slightly glossy surface, and the cap appears to be a screw-on type, providing a secure closure. The label wraps partially around the bottle, but the back and sides are mostly plain green with no additional graphics. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban environments such as bathrooms, salons, or personal care shops.
description: A tall, dark green bottle with a black screw-on cap and a colorful floral label on the front. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with most of the bottle plain green.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful floral label and white text on the dark green bottle with a black cap.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the edge of the label and mostly plain green surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the entirely plain dark green surface with no label or graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other edge of the label and the plain green bottle.
